steps.title: Spot the parallel
steps.content: The first example places Thomas's personal journey within the Great Migration. The next sentence gives the same kind of relationship for Beulah: personal events set against a broader historical movement.

steps.title: Pick a similarity transition
steps.content: Choice A signals specificity, Choice B signals result, and Choice C signals disregard or contrast. The sentence needs a transition showing that Cole uses a similar technique for Beulah. The answer is D.
